since_last: 56% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.44%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC -4.50% · Gold -2.62% · Nasdaq100 +1.86%. 56% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.44%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.44%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +11.65%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +11.65%, MRVL +11.11%, TLN +8.25%, SMCI +8.23%, INTC +8.19%. Laggards: SPCX -8.48%, INOD -8.33%, IBM -6.07%, MDB -4.89%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.48% at $175.56
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
